# Australian Linen & Towels

> Wholesale supplier of premium commercial linens, towels, and bed sheets for hotels, motels, spas, resorts, gyms, Airbnb hosts, and hospitality businesses across Australia. Based in Griffith, NSW (Riverina). Trade pricing available with no minimum order quantity. Australian-owned. ABN 86 602 936 725.

## About

Australian Linen & Towels (ABN 86 602 936 725) is a B2B wholesale supplier based in Griffith, NSW 2680, serving the Australian hospitality industry. This is a distinct, Australian-owned business operating from the Riverina region of New South Wales. We provide hotel-grade commercial textiles designed to withstand industrial laundering while maintaining a premium look and feel. Our customers include boutique hotels, motels, day spas, beauty salons, resorts, gyms, short-stay Airbnb operators, and hospitality businesses across all Australian states.

- **Business Type:** Wholesale / B2B
- **ABN:** 86 602 936 725 (Australian-owned)
- **Location:** Griffith, NSW 2680, Australia (Riverina region)
- **Service Area:** All of Australia (free shipping on orders over AU$100)
- **Contact:** info@auslinenandtowels.com.au · 0414 533 449
- **Website:** https://auslinenandtowels.com.au
- **Trading Hours:** Mon–Fri 9am–5pm, Sat 9am–1pm AEST

## Product Range

### Commercial Towels
- White bath towels, hand towels, face washers, bath mats — 100% combed cotton, hospitality-grade
- Charcoal towels (bath, hand, face)
- Camel towels (bath, hand)
- Black, Navy towels (bath, hand)
- Coloured towels: Aqua, Cherry, Coffee, Fuchsia, Garnet, Lime, Mirage, Pink, Purple, Royal
- Pool & Stripe towels (pool/beach use)
- Gym towels (white, compact)
- Salon towels (white, professional-grade)
- Bathrobes (terry cloth)

### Bed Linen
- White flat sheets and fitted sheets (Single, Double, Queen, King)
- Pillowcases (Standard, King)
- Striped and coloured sheets
- Quilt covers (white, stripe, navy)
- Quilts / doonas (microfibre fill, washable)
- Cellular blankets and faux-wool blankets
- Cotton-polyester blend, designed for high-volume laundering

### Mattress & Pillow Protection
- Mattress protectors (Queen, King) — waterproof, noiseless
- Pillow protectors
- Microfibre pillows

### Other
- Tea towels (blue stripe)

## Industry Segments We Serve

- **Hotels** — 3-star to 5-star, full room linen kits, PAR-level ordering
- **Motels** — Budget to mid-scale, durable high-turnover stock
- **Day Spas & Wellness Centres** — Treatment towels, robes, soft-touch linens
- **Gyms & Fitness Centres** — Compact gym towels, bulk supply
- **Airbnb & Short-Stay Hosts** — Starter kits, 3–4 PAR per property, white commercial-grade
- **Restaurants & Cafes** — Tea towels and napery

## Key Selling Points

- 20+ years of industry experience in commercial textiles
- Free Australia-wide shipping on orders over AU$100
- No minimum order quantity — buy what you need
- Trade pricing available for hospitality businesses
- Net 30 terms for approved credit accounts
- Stock items typically ship within 1–2 business days
- GSM verified, commercial-laundry rated textiles

## Operator Guides (Blog — Linen Journal)

- [The Australian Operator's GSM Guide](https://auslinenandtowels.com.au/blog-gsm-guide.html): Choosing the right towel weight — 400 to 700 GSM explained
- [The Real Cost of Cheap Linen](https://auslinenandtowels.com.au/blog-lifecycle-cost.html): Lifecycle cost analysis — why commercial-grade beats budget on annual spend
- [When Is Linen Actually Finished? The Inspection & Discard Guide](https://auslinenandtowels.com.au/blog-discard-guide.html): Six-test field inspection protocol, category discard triggers, aged-care compliance
- [The Airbnb Linen Starter Kit](https://auslinenandtowels.com.au/blog-airbnb-linen-guide.html): PAR levels for short-stay hosts, item-by-item buying list, GSM choices
- [The Hotel Linen Buying Checklist](https://auslinenandtowels.com.au/blog-hotel-buying-checklist.html): PAR levels per room, GSM & blend by item, supplier vetting questions
- [How to Choose a Wholesale Linen Supplier in Australia](https://auslinenandtowels.com.au/blog-choosing-linen-supplier.html): MOQ, lead times, quality consistency, supplier vetting for hospitality buyers
- [Day Spa & Salon Towels: An Australian Buyer's Guide](https://auslinenandtowels.com.au/blog-spa-salon-towels.html): GSM for salon vs spa, black bleach-proof towels, sizes, par levels per chair
- [Gym & Fitness Towels: A Bulk Buying Guide for Australia](https://auslinenandtowels.com.au/blog-gym-towels.html): GSM and size for gym towels, quick-dry options, par levels, bulk buying economics
- [Motel Linen on a Budget: Quality Without Cutting Corners](https://auslinenandtowels.com.au/blog-motel-linen-budget.html): where to save on motel linen, towel GSM, poly-cotton percale sheets, PAR levels

## Common Questions

**What is GSM?** GSM (grams per square metre) measures towel density. Higher GSM means thicker, more absorbent towels. Motels typically use 450–550 GSM; hotels 500–650 GSM; spas 600–700 GSM.

**What is PAR level?** PAR level is how many full sets of linen you keep in circulation per room. The hospitality standard is 3-PAR (one in use, one in the wash, one in reserve). Same-day turnovers need 4-PAR.

**Do you offer trade pricing?** Yes — apply for a trade account or contact us with your business details for a wholesale quote.

**Do you ship Australia-wide?** Yes, free shipping on orders over AU$100. Delivery takes 3–8 business days depending on location.

**What is the minimum order?** No minimum order quantity. Buy one item or a full PAR kit.

**Do you supply Airbnb hosts?** Yes. We supply short-stay and Airbnb operators with commercial-grade white linen sized to their property. Contact us with bed and bathroom count for a starter-kit quote.

**What blend are your sheets?** Cotton-polyester percale for standard commercial use; cotton-rich options available. All blends are rated for high-temperature commercial laundering.
